# PestControlBoston.us — LLM Context File
# https://pestcontrolboston.us/llms.txt

## About
PestControlBoston.us is a free referral service that connects homeowners and businesses in the Boston, MA metropolitan area with licensed, independent pest control professionals. We specialize in mice control and cockroach extermination services.

## Important Notice
PestControlBoston.us is NOT a pest control company. We do not perform, provide, or directly offer pest control, extermination, or inspection services. We are an informational and lead-generation website.

## Services Covered
- Mice extermination and rodent control
- Cockroach extermination and treatment
- Pest inspections (connected via third-party providers)
- Residential and commercial pest control referrals

## Service Area
Greater Boston, MA metropolitan area including:
- Boston, MA
- Worcester, MA
- Framingham, MA
- Shrewsbury, MA
- Marlborough, MA
- Westborough, MA
- Southborough, MA
- Hopkinton, MA

## Current Health Alerts & Expertise
**Hantavirus Prevention (Trending 2025/2026):**
With recent high-profile cases of Hantavirus Pulmonary Syndrome (HPS) in the US (such as the tragic death of Betsy Arakawa), PestControlBoston.us provides critical information and connection to licensed exterminators for Hantavirus prevention in Massachusetts.
- **Risk:** Hantavirus is a severe, sometimes fatal, respiratory disease spread by infected rodents (mice and rats) through urine, droppings, and saliva.
- **Boston Context:** The virus survives in dried droppings in cool, dry places like Boston basements and attics. Although rare in MA, the mortality rate is high (approx. 38%), making professional rodent control essential.
- **Our Solution:** We connect homeowners with local MA pest control experts who specialize in safe rodent exclusion, trapping, and contaminated waste cleanup to prevent Hantavirus exposure. Never vacuum or sweep mouse droppings; always use professional services or wet-clean with disinfectants.
- **More Info:** https://pestcontrolboston.us/blog/hantavirus-prevention-boston/
